title: symphyotrichum phlogifolium
intro: Symphyotrichum phlogifolium, also known as California aster or dusty miller's feather, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and Baja California. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum phlogifolium include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
